zh.lifeSummary: John Stanley是Thomas Stanley和Matilda de Arderne的兒子，於1423年出生在英國斯塔福爾艾爾福德。他於1428年與Cecelia De Arderne在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1450年被列為sheriff of staffordshire。他去世於1476年6月29日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年53歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾艾爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Stanley是Thomas Stanley和Matilda de Arderne的儿子，于1423年出生在英国斯塔福爾艾爾福德。他于1428年与Cecelia De Arderne在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1450年被列为sheriff of staffordshire。他去世于1476年6月29日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年53岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾艾爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: John Stanley was born in 1423, in Elford, Staffordshire, England as the son of Thomas Stanley and Matilda de Arderne. He married Cecelia De Arderne in 1428, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1450, at the age of 27, his occupation is listed as sheriff of staffordshire. He died on 29 June 1476, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Elford, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Stanley est né en 1423, à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, fils de Thomas Stanley et Matilda de Arderne. Il a épousé Cecelia De Arderne en 1428, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1450, à l’âge de 27 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of staffordshire. Il est décédé le 29 juin 1476, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Stanley wurde 1423 in Elford, Staffordshire, England, als Sohn von Thomas Stanley und Matilda de Arderne geboren. Er hat 1428 in England, United Kingdom Cecelia De Arderne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1450, als er 27 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of staffordshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. Juni 1476 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Elford, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Stanley è nato il nel 1423 nel Elford, Staffordshire, England come figlio di Thomas Stanley e Matilda de Arderne. Lui sposato Cecelia De Arderne nel 1428, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1450, all'età di 27 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of staffordshire. Morì il 29 giugno 1476, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Elford, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stanleyは1423年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォードでThomas StanleyとMatilda de Arderneの息子として生まれた。1428年にイギリスイギリスでCecelia De Arderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1450年，27歳の時，職業はsheriff of staffordshireと記録されている。彼は1476年6月29日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで53歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stanley(은)는 1423년 영국 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에서 Thomas Stanley(와)과 Matilda de Arderne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1428년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Cecelia De Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1450년, 27세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of staffordshire이었다. 그는 1476년 6월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Stanley nasceu em 1423, em Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra filho de Thomas Stanley e Matilda de Arderne. Ele casou-se com Cecelia De Arderne em 1428, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1450, com 27 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of staffordshire. Ele faleceu em 29 de junho de 1476, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Stanley родился в 1423 г. в местности элфорд, стаффордшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Thomas Stanley и Matilda de Arderne. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecelia De Arderne в 1428 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1450 году, в возрасте 27 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of staffordshire. Он умер 29 июня 1476 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности элфорд, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Stanley nació en 1423, en Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Thomas Stanley y Matilda de Arderne. Se casó con Cecelia De Arderne en 1428, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1450, a la edad de 27 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of staffordshire. Murió el 29 de junio de 1476, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
